paper_title: Sampling and Genetic Diversity Characterization of Pinus pinceana

methods.description: Process for collecting samples from Pinus pinceana and extracting DNA for genetic analysis.

steps.description: Needles from nine healthy, regularly distributed adult trees were sampled.
steps.searchable_summary: collect needle samples from adult trees

steps.description: DNA was extracted using the CTAB protocol (Doyle & Doyle, 1987).

methods.description: Sequencing of DNA samples and quality control of the reads.

steps.description: Samples with a concentration over 100 ng/ml were double-digested with the restriction enzymes Pstl/Mspl.
steps.searchable_summary: digest DNA samples with Pstl/Mspl enzymes

steps.description: The fragments were single-end sequenced with an Illumina Hi-Seq 2500.
steps.searchable_summary: sequence DNA fragments using Illumina Hi-Seq 2500

steps.description: The read adapters were removed using TRIMMOMATIC (v0.36).
The read quality was visualized with FASTQC (v0.11.7) and MULTIQC (v1.9).
steps.searchable_summary: visualize read quality with FASTQC and MULTIQC

methods.description: Mapping of high-quality reads to a reference genome and filtering of SNPs.

steps.description: High-quality reads were mapped to the P. lambertiana genome assembly using the BWA-MEM algorithm (v0.7.10).
steps.searchable_summary: map reads to reference genome using BWA-MEM

steps.description: The MarkDuplicates feature from the Picard package was used to correct artifacts of PCR duplication.
steps.searchable_summary: correct PCR duplicates using Picard MarkDuplicates

steps.description: We obtained a set of curated SNPs that were filtered prior to analysis using VCFtools (v0.1.16).

methods.description: Estimation of genetic diversity metrics for the sampled populations.

steps.description: We estimated the genetic diversity for the 10 populations using observed heterozygosity (H O ), within-population gene diversity (H S ), and the inbreeding coefficient (F IS ) using the R package Hierfstat.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate genetic diversity metrics using Hierfstat

steps.description: DNAsp (v6) was used to calculate allelic richness, per site nucleotide diversity (π), and pairwise population differentiation (F ST ).
steps.searchable_summary: calculate allelic richness and nucleotide diversity using DNAsp
